DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT BRUCE GLADSTONE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. DUE TO NO APPEARANCES, THE PARTIES ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED. RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY SEPTEMBER 15, 2016. SANCTIONS OF $564 AWARDED TO THE MOVING PARTY. ORDER SIGNED. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BRUCE GLADSTONE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

No appearances. Due to no appearances, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed; motion granted. Responses to be served by September 15, 2016. Sanctions of $564 awarded to the moving party. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)
